title: TreexBuyer
body:
## TreexBuyer - Modern plugin for creating a buyer for your server.
A multifunctional plugin that will enrich your server and delight your players, featuring automatic purchasing, GUI-based selling, dynamic price multipliers based on sales volume, inventory value display in the action bar, and item price display directly beneath the item description.

| **Dependencies**| |
|:-|-|
| **Libb** | [Download](https://modrinth.com/plugin/libb) |
| Java 17 or higher | 
| Paper or forks |
| Minecraft Version 1.20 or higher |

[![WIKI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31b63c1cc08964f616ae35ec874741870f4c8bb4.png)](https://wiki.jetby.space/plugins/treexbuyer)[![DISCORD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60fcf5a0b12f3cff46b065aea871b3f08629f94e.png)](https://dsc.gg/jmdev)[![DONATE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a1b54c640e2f990880107e8bf3cd6c573a9201a.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jetby)

## Advantages:
- Unlimited number of menus
- Price below the items
- Auto sell items
- Selling items from inventory to menu
- Selling items by clicking on the item
- Full customization
- Leveling system
